name: The (Not So) Grim Reaper
description:
Death is certain, but the hour is not. Kind of a rough deal, isn't it? Never to know if starting to read that big book you bought is even worth it - you might not even get to the good parts before the Reaper comes to collect. What a waste of time and money that would turn out to be, huh?


Let's share a little wisdom, to make things easier, so perk your ears, alright? The trick is to know...not fear, to know that the end is coming. Maybe not today, or tomorrow, or any time soon, but it is coming. And when it does...and you've lived a good life...you'll leave no regrets behind. Embrace that truth, and live every moment as if it's your last. And when Death finally takes you by the hand, you'll go with a smile to wherever She leads you.
creator: OldManMoment
